positive: A hyper-detailed, highly symmetrical circular mandala design, suitable for apparel printing. The core subject is a fusion of bioluminescent cosmic flora (starry flowers, crystalline leaves) and celestial geometry, interlocked with stylized mystical forest creatures (peacocks, iridescent moths). The style must emulate intricate etching and stained-glass artistry combined with vivid neon gradient lighting. Composition should be perfectly balanced, highly centralized, and possess strong, clean silhouettes against a deep indigo, midnight blue background. Use a vibrant color palette of electric teal, deep violet, ethereal gold, and magenta. The lines must be crisp, the details ultra-sharp, and the overall aesthetic must feel luxurious and otherworldly. Art Nouveau meets Space Age.
negative: blur, grainy, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, logo, abstract, cropped, poor quality, bad composition, cartoon, childish, solid colors, messy lines, artifacts
